message:
feat(cli): update CLI library and robot mode with latest core changes

- cli/lib.rs: update CLI library to wire new core detection modules
  and expose agent name validation through the command interface
- cli/robot.rs: update robot (non-interactive) mode to support new
  tool description format and detection features
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker with completed work across
  core detection, tool parity, TUI overhaul, and DB improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
